svg.title: PowerHub Billing & Automation System Architecture
svg.desc: A structural diagram showing how payment data flows from the source payment table through four analytical engines to the control unit and customer communications.
svg.text: Stack: Amazon Redshift · LookML / Looker · sunking_public_s3 · easybuy schema · REST API (control unit)
Built by Ngozi Clement · SunKing Pay Kenya · 2026
